title: When Romance Rides
director: Jean Hersholt, Eliot Howe, Charles O. Rush
actors: Claire Adams, Carl Gantvoort, Jean Hersholt
plot: Lucy Bostil, daughter of a Colorado ranch owner, is led by a dog to his master, Lin Slone, who is exhausted from a struggle to capture a wild horse; she revives Lin and they christen the horse "Wildfire." The Bostils have entered ...
